commands.review_summary:
The branch updates ChatGPT browser-mode thinking-effort selection for standalone Pro/Thinking, Intelligence, and legacy picker layouts, adds bounded picker diagnostics, filters active Pro-thinking placeholders, updates docs/changelog, and adds browser regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. The PR body reports an authenticated June 11 live repro where current main returned chip-not-found, and source inspection confirms main lacks the standalone Pro composer effort-pill path.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed; the remaining action is maintainer merge review and optional PR metadata cleanup.

target.title: fix(browser): support current ChatGPT Pro Extended picker
target.body:
## Problem

Fixes #244. GPT-5.5 Pro Extended browser consults can fail before prompt submission when ChatGPT changes the owner or markup of its thinking-effort control:

```text
Thinking time: chip not found for pro (requested Extended); refusing to submit without confirmed Pro Extended.
```

## Current root cause

Authenticated live reproduction on June 11, 2026 found that current ChatGPT uses a standalone composer effort pill:

- visible `form button.__composer-pill[aria-haspopup="menu"]` labeled `Pro`
- an `aria-controls` menu containing `Standard` and `Extended`
- no visible `[data-testid="composer-intelligence-picker-content"]`
- no legacy `[data-model-picker-thinking-effort-action]` controls

The exact generated expression from current `main` returned:

```json
{"status":"chip-not-found"}
```

The contributor's earlier unified Intelligence picker remains a useful compatibility layout, but it is no longer the current live owner.

## Fix

- Prefer the standalone Pro/Thinking composer pill and resolve its controlled effort menu.
- Retain support for the earlier Intelligence picker and legacy per-model trailing controls.
- Verify the requested option from standard selected-state attributes after clicking. Pro Extended remains fail-closed if selection cannot be confirmed; the proposed relaxed environment escape hatch was removed.
- Emit bounded, redacted picker diagnostics through the normal `[browser]` logging path so non-verbose sessions persist them.
- Ignore status-only assistant turns such as `Pro thinking` only while the Stop control shows generation is active, preserving completed exact-word answers.
- Invoke the markdown fallback extractor in snapshot polling; the previous snapshot path returned the extractor function instead of its result.

## Authenticated live proof

Using the existing signed-in Chrome profile, with account/session details omitted:

- current `main`: `{"status":"chip-not-found"}`
- patched expression: `{"status":"switched","label":"Extended"}`
- patched expression repeated: `{"status":"already-selected","label":"Extended"}`
- real Pro submission completed with exact marker `ORACLE_PR235_BROWSER_OK`
- while generation was active and the Stop control was visible, the production snapshot returned `null` for the transient status turn
- after completion, the same snapshot path returned exact marker `ORACLE_PR235_FINAL2_OK`

## Validation

- `pnpm run check`
- `pnpm run docs:check` (85 flags, 6 files)
- `pnpm test` (137 files passed, 18 skipped; 1,164 tests passed, 41 skipped)
- `pnpm run build`
- `pnpm run docs:site`
- `pnpm run test:packed-cli`
- focused browser regression suite (50 tests passed)
- structured Codex autoreview: clean, no accepted/actionable findings

Contributor credit is preserved in Umut's authored picker commit and the changelog entry thanks `@umutkeltek`.
target.author: umutkeltek
